prompt: Crie um dashboard analytics dark mode para um app de fitness, estilo Apple Fitness+

assertions.name: asks-vibe-or-confirms-style
assertions.description: Asks about vibe or confirms the dark style before coding

assertions.name: generates-design-tokens-first
assertions.description: Generates CSS custom properties with dark theme tokens BEFORE writing HTML

assertions.name: dark-mode-color-tokens
assertions.description: Defines dark mode color palette with proper contrast ratios (WCAG AA minimum)

assertions.name: uses-8px-spacing-system
assertions.description: Uses multiples of 8px for spacing (padding, margin, gap)

assertions.name: responsive-3-breakpoints
assertions.description: Has responsive styles for mobile, tablet, and desktop

assertions.name: semantic-html-with-aria
assertions.description: Uses semantic HTML elements with aria-labels and alt texts

note: Run Skill Creator eval cycle to score assertions
